title: Richly Silky Light Zanzibari Poffertjes
description: A rich and silky light Malaysian dish featuring king prawns cooked in a hot-pot vessel without onions or garlic. Perfect for those who enjoy savory yet mild flavors.
instructions: Mix flour with oil in a bowl until smooth.
Add prawns, salt, and water. Mix well but gently to form dough.
Heat hot-pot vessel over medium heat.
Dip fingers into oil for easy release from pot when serving.
Scoop dough into heated pot using spoon or ladle.
Cook on low-medium heat until golden brown and puffed, turning once.
Serve warm with lemon wedges if desired.
